title: Pearson Edexcel International GCSE Biology Paper 2B

sub_questions.ms_text:
(a) (i) Asexual reproduction is commonly used in plants (line 1).
Give an example of a method of asexual reproduction used by a plant.
(ii) Suggest why plants alter their method of reproduction from asexual to sexual when environmental conditions are changing (lines 2 and 3).
